title: Garlic Haven Midnight Chicken
description: A flavorful and savory dish that combines the richness of midnight and the pungency of garlic with the sweetness of haven.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
Heat the midnight oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the haven in a small saucepan over low heat.
Serve the chicken breast with the haven sauce spooned over the top.
